Meal.title: Nutrition Meal Entry
Meal.description: Daily food logger entry tracking consumed items and macro profiles.

foodName.description: The description/name of the food item.

quantity.description: Amount consumed in weight or units.

userId.description: The reference UID of the authenticated user.

date.description: The human readable calendar string date context (e.g. Wed May 28 2026).

Checkin.title: Wellness Check-in Note
Checkin.description: User shared daily mood scale, energy evaluation, and supportive mental wellness journal details.

note.description: Daily physical or mental training thoughts.

userId.description: The reference UID of the authenticated user.

date.description: The human readable calendar string date context.

Streak.title: User Active Training Streak
Streak.description: Metadata document tracking current usage streak and longest consecutive training days.

lastActive.description: Last active calendar string date context to verify continuity.

UserProfile.title: User Profile Document
UserProfile.description: User account settings, wellness goals, and historical activity settings.

name.description: The full name of the registered user.

goal.description: The primary user goal: lose_weight, gain_muscle, or maintain.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile document linking auth register variables.

/users/{userId}/meals/{mealId}.description: Sub-collection of user logged meal entries.

/users/{userId}/checkins/{checkinId}.description: Sub-collection of user physical check-in parameters.

/users/{userId}/meta/streak.description: Streak parameters document tracking consecutive usage.
